title: Lazy Lasange
description: Viral Lazy Girl Lasagna, a one pot meal your family will actually eat
method: Brown the mince, onion and carrot until softened.
Stir through the Italian Herbs, then add the tinned tomatoes and beef stock.
Break the lasagna sheets into pieces and stir them into the sauce.
Cover and simmer until the pasta is almost tender.
Add chunks of cream cheese and stir until melted and creamy.
Top with fresh mozzarella and a sprinkle of extra Italian Herbs, then grill until golden and bubbly.
